name: memex-hermes-engine
description: TypeScript engine extensions for memex-hermes: Hermes.* hook_event_name dispatch handlers compiled into the memex-hermes binary (own GitHub release). Built via `bun build --compile` against @jim80net/memex-core as a library dependency. Not published to npm.

scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test
